partials.text: {"display":"checklist","title":"Databricks Call Brief","context":[{"text":"Founded 2013 by Apache Spark creators (UC Berkeley AMPLab); HQ San Francisco","priority":"high"},{"text":"Valuation: $62B (Dec 2024 Series J, $10B raised)","priority":"high"},{"text":"Core products: Lakehouse Platform, Delta Lake, MLflow, Unity Catalog","priority":"high"},{"text":"FY2024 ARR: ~$1.6B, growing ~50% YoY","priority":"high"},{"text":"CEO: Ali Ghodsi (co-founder); ~6,000 employees","priority":"medium"},{"text":"Key competitors: Snowflake, Google BigQuery, AWS Glue/Redshift","priority":"medium"},{"text":"2023 acq: MosaicML ($1.3B) — signals strong LLM/AI training push","priority":"medium"},{"text":"Customers: Apple, Comcast, Condé Nast, Shell, Walgreens","priority":"low"}],"items":[{"text":"Ask about their current data stack — Spark-native or migrating?","checked":false},{"text":"Probe on Snowflake displacement — common competitive angle","checked":false},{"text":"Discuss AI/ML workloads — MosaicML integration is a differentiator","checked":false},{"text":"Unity Catalog GA'd 2023 — governance pain points?","checked":false},{"text":"Pricing model: DBU (Databricks Units) consumption-based — confirm budget scope","checked":false}]}
